title: ampelocalamus hirsutissimus
intro: Ampelocalamus hirsutissimus, also known as the hairy bamboo, is a type of bamboo plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ampelocalamus hirsutissimus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ampelocalamus hirsutissimus include teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be made by steeping the roots or stalks in hot water.
